info.name: School Health Backend - BVA All Functions
info.description:
Postman collection kiem thu cac chuc nang School Health theo BVA va Equivalence Partitioning (89 requests, 13 modules).

HUONG DAN IMPORT (BAT BUOC Replace):
1. Postman > Import > chon file JSON nay > **Replace** collection cu
2. Import environment: backend/postman/local.postman_environment.json
3. Khoi dong backend + MySQL truoc khi chay

THU TU CHAY COLLECTION RUNNER:
01 Auth > 02 Users > 03 Parents > 04 Students (studentId) > 05 Nurses (nurseId) > ... > 13 Vaccination

HTTP STATUS (POST tao moi):
- 200: /api/user, /api/parent, /api/students, /api/nurses, /api/managers, /api/school-health-docs, /api/health-profiles
- 201: /api/blogs, /api/medical-supplies, /api/health-incidents, /api/medical-checkup/notify, /api/medical-checkup/result, /api/vaccination-schedules

LUU Y:
- Moi request co script Tests san; khong paste lai
- Neu loi 'tc already declared': xoa script cu trong tab Tests roi import lai
- BVA-AUTH-03 co prerequest dong bo mat khau admin (callback, khong dung async/await)
